feed.title: Kappafy — JSON Explorer & Mock API Generator Blog

author.name: Kappafy — JSON Explorer & Mock API Generator

entry.title: Mock APIs in 30 Seconds for Frontend Development — Kappafy
entry.summary: Generate mock API endpoints from sample JSON data for frontend development. Build features without waiting for the backend.

entry.title: JSON Schema Design Patterns for Clean APIs — Kappafy
entry.summary: Practical patterns for designing JSON schemas that are consistent, extensible, and easy for API clients to consume.
